'''''Star Wars: Shatterpoint''''' is a miniatures skirmish game released by [[Atomic Mass Games]] under [[Asmodee Group|Asmodee]] on [[June 2]], [[2023]]<ref name="Core Set" /> The game features characters and factions of the [[Clone Wars]] and [[Galactic Civil War]] eras,<ref name="Squad Building">{{AtomicMassGames|url=transmission/star-wars-shatterpoint-squad-building|text=STAR WARS: Shatterpoint Squad Building|date=2023-02-13}}</ref> specifically grouping them as [[squad]] leaders,<ref name="Squad Leaders tweet">{{Twitter|atomicmassgames|status/1594739988352348160|[[Atomic Mass Games]]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/Lef8B}}</ref> second-in-commands,<ref name="Second in Command tweet">{{Twitter|atomicmassgames|status/1597274844894224384|[[Atomic Mass Games]]|quote=Leaders are nothing without a second in command! Which Star Wars: Shatterpoint card art is your favorite – Bo-Katan, Gar Saxon, Captain Rex, or General Kalani?|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/Q9JFj}}</ref> and [[troop]]s. The game started with the release of its [[Star Wars: Shatterpoint Core Set|Core Set]].<ref name="Core Set Tweet 1">{{Twitter|atomicmassgames|status/1592202007795769344|[[Atomic Mass Games]]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/KEzsZ}}</ref><ref name="Core Set Tweet 2">{{Twitter|atomicmassgames|status/1592563867099414528|[[Atomic Mass Games]]|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/4ca4U}}</ref>
